seed_problem: max-weight integer circulation on a byproduct-exchange network
mutation: composite: material-balance feasibility forces value onto closed multi-hop loops, with a per-unit transport tax (waste penalty) and planted long near-lossless cycles hidden among strongly-taxed noise; the bilateral 2-cycle matching is a calibrated trap baseline
title: Eco-Industrial Park: Waste-Exchange Loops
strategies: bilateral matching: circulate every profitable two-plant 2-cycle only (the baseline; ratio ~0.1)
short-cycle greedy: also enumerate profitable 3-cycles, still blind to longer loops
cycle-centric search: negative-cost cycle canceling / bounded-depth loop finding on the residual graph, capturing the long planted loops that dominate the objective
min-cost circulation relaxation with loop rounding for the deepest loops the bounded search misses
